company_type: Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) - Healthcare & Seniors Housing

dependencies: Reliance on third-party operators and managers for property operations
Dependence on construction materials and labor for development projects
Reliance on financial institutions for credit facilities and financing
risks: Dependence on operators' and tenants' ability to manage supply chain for their operations
Labor shortages for medical and non-medical staff at operated properties
Material shortages and price volatility in construction
Supply chain disruptions affecting construction materials and labor

Operator performance risk - substantially all revenues depend on operators' ability to generate sufficient cash to make payments; operator transitions and bankruptcies (e.g., Genesis HealthCare exit); concentration risk with top operators

regulatory_risks: State and local healthcare regulations affecting operators
Federal Anti-Kickback Statute (AKS) and Stark Law compliance
Foreign regulatory requirements in Canada and UK
Potential changes to RIDEA (REIT Investment Diversification and Empowerment Act) regulations
Sustainability and ESG reporting regulations (evolving)
Americans with Disabilities Act compliance
Americans with Disabilities Act and Fair Housing Act compliance
AI-related regulations (emerging and uncertain)
Canadian provincial healthcare and privacy regulations
UK Data Protection Act 2018 and UK GDPR compliance
State-specific healthcare regulations (e.g., California SB-525 minimum wage requirements)
Environmental contamination remediation requirements
State and federal healthcare licensing and certification requirements
Changes in healthcare reimbursement policies (Medicare, Medicaid)
Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) standards
Environmental regulations and compliance costs
Healthcare facility licensing and regulatory compliance requirements
EU GDPR compliance for cross-border data transfers
Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax (15%) under Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 (Pillar 2)
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code
CMS minimum staffing standards for long-term care facilities
Washington My Health My Data Act and Nevada consumer health data privacy law
OECD Pillar 2 global minimum tax rules (UK and Canada implementation)
Securities regulations and NYSE listing requirements
HIPAA and data privacy regulations (federal and state-level)
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code - must distribute at least 90% of taxable income
UK Care Quality Commission (CQC) regulations for care homes
Anti-ESG legislation and policies in certain jurisdictions
Tax law changes affecting REIT status
Medicare and Medicaid reimbursement rate changes and operational requirements
HIPAA and patient privacy regulations
Corporate governance and Sarbanes-Oxley compliance
Certificate of Need (CON) laws restricting facility expansion
State-specific consumer data privacy laws (California, Colorado, Connecticut, etc.)
Federal False Claims Act (FCA) enforcement

sanction_risks: UK economic volatility from geopolitical tensions and energy crisis
Foreign currency exchange rate fluctuations (CAD, GBP) due to geopolitical events
Trade disputes and tariffs impacting construction material costs and supply chain
Potential sanctions compliance requirements affecting international operations
Impact of geopolitical tensions (Russia-Ukraine conflict, Middle East conflicts) on operations
